title: heliophila minor
intro: Heliophila minor, also known as Rock Jet or Baneberry, is a small, annual or biennial flowering plant native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties are attributed to its compounds, including flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Heliophila minor include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Heliophila minor is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
